description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/invoice.json to correct the WIDGET-B quantity from the over-billed 65 to the true received quantity of 50, matching goods_receipt.json. All lines then match the PO on price and the goods receipt on quantity, so pytest exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran pytest -q: test_every_invoice_line_matches_goods_receipt_quantity failed for WIDGET-B (invoice quantity=65, goods_receipt quantity_received=50). Correcting invoice.json's WIDGET-B quantity to 50. Not touching purchase_order.json, goods_receipt.json, or the test.
interactions.notes: The fix — pytest -q now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
